title: An Embarrassing Mistake
content: During an important meeting at work, Ethan accidentally sent a private message to the entire company group chat instead of one coworker. The message was harmless, but it included a joke about how long the meeting was lasting. Within seconds, several coworkers started reacting with laughing emojis, and Ethan immediately realized his mistake. His face turned red with embarrassment while he quickly tried to delete the message. Surprisingly, even his manager laughed about it and admitted the meeting was taking too long. Although Ethan felt uncomfortable for the rest of the afternoon, the situation became a funny story people mentioned for weeks afterward.
